reviews.review_msg: I'm a bit biased- I absolutely love Rob! The lectures covered a lot of really interesting material. They were entertaining yet informative, and Rob really encouraged discussion. He was also very friendly and helpful when I asked him about career-related things unrelated to the course. Search a little and you can find the texts in a public library.

Bittner was one of the best profs I've ever had. He was hilarious, engaging, and chose great reading content. Wish that his lectures were a little more clear, there was always a lot on the slides and not enough time to write it all down. That being said, I would recommend him in a heartbeat!

Bittner is so amazing! He's great at explaining things in class and always encourages questions... our lectures ended up like big discussions and it was awesome. He also is super helpful outside of class if you seek it out.

His midterm was the easiest exam I have ever taken in university. He reviews everything with the class the week before. I just wish his slides had a little more information, I honestly would learn more from my TA. This class is still super easy even if you do not have a great TA, however, mine was spectacular.
Really fun and interesting classes! Such a great teacher!
I took Sex Talk with Bittner and he was super fun and engaging the whole time. He was funny during class, and encouraged questions. Loved it. I recommend the class to anyone.

Loved the content for the course, as I did HIST 115 last term, but the grading in this class was horrific. It took forever to be graded, and the marks I got were never followed up with ANY feedback, and when I reached out to my TA there was zero elaboration. Fung seemed nice, but getting a TA in their courses is like playing russian roulette.

The grading is insanely subjective and provides zero feedback. It takes weeks for anything to be marked. We got our project marked that we started in the middle of the term AFTER THE FINAL WAS DONE. There is no way to get help for your work because everything will be marked so late so you have no way of knowing how you're doing in the term. avoid!!

Super easy, instructions were clear. I never watched any of the lectures, the lecture notes that are provided. Quizzes are easy and straightforward/ GPA booster. But be specific when selecting your topic. I spent maybe a hour a week on the course. Exam was simple and easy and were able to do online with plenty of time.
genuinely how is this class real. I have no words just don't even consider taking this I wish I saved myself a semester from hell

Had an assignment that required a "unique" topic, chose an unique topic, got marks deducted due to this topic being already discussed sometime in the past. Start researching for this topic, can't find a single article related to my topic. Found 2 tangentially related articles in German, got further marks deducted for not using those articles.

Lectures were recorded by someone else, didn't have a problem with that, it was fine. TA's mark learning activities, quizzes not hard if you do the lecture. Midterm was hard (2 hours to complete time limit) and marked roughly. Had a few problems submitting and Dr. Fung helped me out and was accepting a late submission upon proof of date editing.

As others have stated, the grading in this class is outrageous. I took this as an elective thinking it would be easy IT IS NOT! Worst grades I've ever gotten and it's a 100 level course? TA's mark everything and lectures are recorded by someone else so this is more of a review of the class rather than the prof. GPA destroyer for sure

Took Sex Talk online & this instructor doesn't have a clear outline for projects. She marks you on how well you understand how to do the assignment rather than how well you understand the course material. 80% of the time when doing your projects you are guessing what the 3 prompts you are given means, rather than actually spending it on researching

Super easy class! There are 2 assignments per week: ONE multiple choice or true or false question, and then a reflection about the readings/lectures! I found this class super interesting. I liked how she structured it so it made me feel more interested in learning more about the topics. The only thing that is super heavy on your grade are the exams
Dr. Leung helped me so much in this course and was very flexible. Great professor for a great class.

Helen is an amazing professor. This course is very easy, yet is still very interesting and relevant to today's world. All of the tests are open book and she gives you a lot of time to complete them. The weekly assignments are also extremely easy and fast to complete. Easy GPA booster !!

I highly recommend taking GSWS 100! It is a very easy course with interesting topics. There are very small and easy assignments weekly, a midterm and final. Most of the lectures have TV shows and movies that are incorporated. Even though it was an online asynchronous course, Helen made the it very easy to navigate on Canvas.

I had Helen in Fall 2022. Her lectures are interesting and engaging and the tutorials were too. The material covered in class is directly relevant to the exams and marking was very generous. We even got tea and coffee for our ten minute break during lectures. Overall very enjoyable course with interesting topics and a very good, organized prof!

Great professor! The lectures were engaging and I like that she shows film clips and an interest in media. My TA Spender was wonderful, they really put in effort in tutorials and marked very fairly. Assignments and readings were fair and not difficult. Class avg was B or B-, would recommend anyone interested to take this course.
really great!! personally i had the best TA in the world who was mostly who taught me tbh. but Dr.Leung is very sweet i absolutely recommend

Professor Leung was so great to have this semester. Her lectures were engaging, she was super caring about her students and provided us with coffee/tea every week. The material was easy, the TAs were very good and graded us fairly.

Professor Leung is so kind and patient, she tries to make concepts as clear as possible. I'm almost sad to have taken this class in my first year because I can't experience it again and I still have a long way to go. I would totally recommend this class. 
I want to clarify that attending lectures was not mandatory, but tutorial attendance was.

Expectations were very unclear for the paper and exams. 2 of 3 books were required for the class but ended up not necessary to read. Each week lecture slides are about 6 slides long - slides lacked detail. On the other hand, lectures were very entertaining, interesting and engaging.

I LOVED HER. Take her course! She and the TAs were so helpful with their consistent feedback! As a first year student, this online course was a great way to familiarize myself with canvas, discussion boards, and how university works. I have all good things to say about Dr. Shearman. Definitely would take her course again!

Reema is a kind person and is always open/asks for feedback. there were quite a few papers on top of weekly readings but overall course material was interesting and she gave grace periods for all assignments. she also gives guides for the weekly readings and viewings which are helpful to understand the course content

This class was required for my program. The class time was used to discuss our understanding of the readings and she wrote down your name when you said something even if it wasn't exactly related. I had to miss class to go to the doctor and she was not very understanding. You should definitely try to attend all classes or your grade will drop a lot
